players_detected.apparel_summary: Red hockey jersey, black pants, black helmet, black gloves
Red hockey jersey, black pants, pink helmet, black gloves
Green hockey jersey, black pants, black helmet, black gloves
Various colored hockey jerseys, helmets, and gear

brand_detection.unidentified_equipment_notes: Hockey sticks, helmets, pads, skates, jerseys, outdoor rink equipment.

paddle_intel.notes: Video shows ice hockey sticks, not pickleball paddles.

storytelling.narrative_arc_summary: Young ice hockey players practice their skills in a snowy outdoor rink, receiving real-time coaching feedback.

commentary.neutral_announcer_espn: Under the lights and falling snow, these young athletes are honing their skills on the ice. We're seeing some determined stickhandling and a solid effort to move the puck.
commentary.hype_announcer_charged: Whoa, check out that puck control in the blizzard! This kid's got the moves, weaving through the defense like a pro! And then a quick release, sending that puck flying!
commentary.coaching_breakdown: Excellent head-up play and puck protection from the red jersey. For the player in green, focus on lowering that center of gravity for tighter turns. And red, let's get that full leg extension for more powerful strides.
commentary.ron_burgundy_voice: By the beard of Zeus, these young gladiators of the ice are a sight to behold! Their stickhandling, a symphony of skill amidst the winter's embrace. Truly, a magnificent display of frozen artistry.
commentary.chuck_norris_voice: Chuck Norris once stickhandled a puck through a blizzard with a toothpick. These kids are learning the way.
commentary.color_commentator_banter: You know, it's not just about the goals at this age, it's about building those fundamentals. And in this snow? That's character building right there!
commentary.announcement_text_for_tts: Under the lights and falling snow, these young athletes are honing their skills on the ice. We're seeing some determined stickhandling and a solid effort to move the puck. Whoa, check out that puck control in the blizzard! This kid's got the moves, weaving through the defense like a pro! And then a quick release, sending that puck flying! Excellent head-up play and puck protection from the red jersey. For the player in green, focus on lowering that center of gravity for tighter turns. And red, let's get that full leg extension for more powerful strides.

daas_signals.clip_summary_one_sentence: Young ice hockey players practice stickhandling and shooting in a snowy outdoor rink with coaching feedback.
